name: quioteframework/telemetry-otel
description: OpenTelemetry SDK exporter/bootstrap for Quiote's always-on Trace facade. Builds worker-lifetime tracer/meter providers from telemetry.* settings and flushes them per request.

extra.quiote-monorepo-note: Developed in-tree under quioteframework/quiote's packages/telemetry-otel/; split to this standalone repo via splitsh/lite on tag push. PRs go to the monorepo, not here. NOTE: this package DELIBERATELY shares the Quiote\Telemetry\ namespace with the kernel -- Trace/TraceRegistry/SpanKind/the no-op handles/MiddlewareSpanDecorator (the always-on, SDK-dependency-free facade) stay in the kernel's own Quiote/Telemetry/ directory; only the OTel-SDK-backed classes (TelemetryBootstrap, OtelSpanHandle, OtelMeterHandle, ForceSampleSampler, Psr7HeaderGetter/Setter, TelemetryPlugin) live here. Composer's longest-prefix-first PSR-4 resolution checks this package's src/ first for any Quiote\Telemetry\* class and falls back to the kernel's Quiote/ root for the rest -- verified working via composer dump-autoload + a full test run. This is the one Tier-1 package that intentionally keeps the shared-namespace-across-packages approach (rejected for csrf/whoops) because the cross-references between the two tiers are extensive and functional (Trace::span() directly instantiates OtelSpanHandle, TraceRegistry has a typed OtelMeterHandle property), not merely adjacent.
